changeSet.author: artem
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS category ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, categoryName VARCHAR(225) NOT NULL )

changeSet.author: artem
artem
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, login VARCHAR(225) NOT NULL UNIQUE, passwordHash VARCHAR(225) NOT NULL UNIQUE, username VARCHAR(225) NOT NULL, avatar VARCHAR(225), profile TEXT, cardDetails VARCHAR(225), status BOOLEAN NOT NULL, userRole VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, createdAt TIMESTAMP(0) WITHOUT TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW() )

changeSet.author: artem
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS refresh ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, userId INTEGER, token TEXT, expiryDate TEXT, FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES users(id) )

changeSet.author: artem
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS article ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, createdBy INTEGER NOT NULL, categoryId INTEGER, title VARCHAR(225) NOT NULL, text TEXT, description TEXT, image TEXT, createdAt TIMESTAMP(0) WITHOUT TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(), updatedAt TIMESTAMP(0) WITHOUT TIME ZONE DEFAULT NULL, draft BOOLEAN, FOREIGN KEY (createdBy) REFERENCES users(id), FOREIGN KEY (categoryId) REFERENCES category(id) )

changeSet.author: artem
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS reaction ( articleId INTEGER NOT NULL, userId INTEGER NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES users(id), FOREIGN KEY (articleId) REFERENCES article(id) )

changeSet.author: artem
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS subscribtion ( subscriberId INTEGER NOT NULL, publisherId INTEGER NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (subscriberId) REFERENCES users(id), FOREIGN KEY (publisherId) REFERENCES users(id) )

changeSet.author: artem
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS saved_article ( userId INTEGER NOT NULL, articleId INTEGER NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES users(id), FOREIGN KEY (articleId) REFERENCES article(id) )

changeSet.author: artem
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS comment ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, articleId INTEGER NOT NULL, userId INTEGER NOT NULL, comment TEXT NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES users(id), FOREIGN KEY (articleId) REFERENCES article(id) )

changeSet.author: artem
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE comment ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS createdat TIMESTAMP(0) WITHOUT TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW();

changeSet.author: artem
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE comment ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS parentcommentid INTEGER DEFAULT NULL REFERENCES comment(id);
